title: MIDI Captain Config
description: Configuration for Paint Audio MIDI Captain MAX custom firmware. This schema is the single source of truth for the config format — TypeScript types are generated from it, Rust structs are validated against it, and Python firmware uses it as reference. Note: the title field drives the generated TypeScript interface name, so keep it short and stable.

device.description: Device model. Determines button count and feature availability (encoder/expression are STD10-only).

global_channel.description: Default MIDI channel for all components. Stored as 0-15, displayed as 1-16 in UI.

usb_drive_name.description: USB drive volume label. FAT32 compatible: uppercase alphanumeric + underscore, max 11 chars.

dev_mode.description: When true, USB drive mounts on every boot. When false (default), requires holding Switch 1 during boot.

buttons.description: Button configurations. Array length must match device type: std10=10, mini6=6, nano4=4, duo2=2, one1=1.

encoder.description: Rotary encoder configuration. Only supported on STD10.

expression.description: Expression pedal configurations. Only supported on STD10.

SelectRepress.description: Behavior when pressing the already-active member of a select group. 'resend' = re-send on-message, 'nothing' = no MIDI, 'deselect' = self-toggle off (CC only; PC reserved for #47).

OffMode.description: LED behavior when button is off. 'dim' = reduced brightness, 'off' = extinguished.

HidAction.description: 'send' = press+release, 'press' = hold key, 'release' = release key(s), 'delay' = pause execution.

HidModifier.description: Modifier key held during the HID action. 'option' is macOS Alt; 'windows' is the Windows/Meta key.

MidiChannel.description: MIDI channel. Stored as 0-15, displayed as 1-16 in UI.

StateOverride.description: Per-state overrides applied when cycling through keytimes. All fields optional — only specified fields override the base button config.

hid_key.description: Key name override for this keytime state.

label.description: Display label. Max 6 chars, alphanumeric + space + hyphen.

type.description: MIDI message type. Determines which fields apply. Default: 'cc'.

mode.description: Button behavior. 'toggle' = latching LED on/off, 'momentary' = LED on while held, 'flash' = brief LED flash on press (PC types only, default for PC types), 'select' = radio-group exclusivity (PC and CC only, requires select_group). Default for CC/Note/HID: 'toggle'.

select_group.description: Radio-group identifier. Required when mode='select'. Pressing a select-mode button activates it and deactivates all sibling buttons sharing the same select_group. PC and CC types only.

select_repress.description: Behavior when re-pressing the already-active select-group member. Default: 'resend'.

off_mode.description: LED behavior when button is off. Default: 'dim'.

channel.description: Per-button MIDI channel override. Inherits global_channel if omitted.

cc.description: CC number. Used when type='cc'. Default: 20 + button index.

cc_on.description: CC value sent when button is pressed (ON). Default: 127.

cc_off.description: CC value sent when button is released (OFF). Default: 0.

note.description: MIDI note number. Used when type='note'. Default: 60 (Middle C).

velocity_on.description: Note velocity when pressed. Used when type='note'. Default: 127.

velocity_off.description: Note velocity when released (Note Off). Used when type='note'. Default: 0.

program.description: Program number. Used when type='pc'. Default: 0.

pc_step.description: Step size for program change increment/decrement. Used when type='pc_inc' or 'pc_dec'.

flash_ms.description: LED flash duration in milliseconds. Used when type is PC and mode is 'flash'.

keytimes.description: Number of states to cycle through on press. 1 = no cycling.

states.description: Per-state overrides. Array length should match keytimes value.

hid_action.description: HID action to perform. Used when type='hid'. Default: 'send'.

hid_key.description: Key name for HID action. Used when type='hid'. Valid values: A-Z, 0-9, F1-F12, Mouse_L, Mouse_R, Space, Esc, Caps, Right, Left, Up, Down, End, Del, PageUp, PageDown, Enter, Pause, Table, BackSpace, Home, Ins, PrintS, all (for release-all).

hid_modifier.description: Optional modifier key held during HID action. Used when type='hid' and hid_action='send' or 'press'.

hid_delay_ms.description: Delay duration in milliseconds. Used when type='hid' and hid_action='delay'.

channel.description: Per-push MIDI channel override. Inherits encoder channel or global_channel if omitted.

cc_on.description: CC value when button ON. Default: 127.

cc_off.description: CC value when button OFF. Default: 0.

max.description: Maximum encoder value. Must be >= min.

initial.description: Starting position. Must be between min and max.

steps.description: Number of discrete steps. null = continuous rotation.

channel.description: Per-encoder MIDI channel override. Inherits global_channel if omitted.

cc.description: CC number sent on pedal movement.

max.description: Maximum output value. Must be >= min.

threshold.description: Deadzone threshold. Only report value changes >= this amount.

channel.description: Per-pedal MIDI channel override. Inherits global_channel if omitted.
